beats.full_text: Trying to outrun anxiety usually makes the loop more expensive. More checking, more explaining, less actual recovery.
beats.ssot_text: Trying to outrun anxiety usually makes the loop more expensive: more checking, more explaining, less actual recovery.

beats.speakable_text: Trying to outrun anxiety usually makes the loop more expensive. More checking, more explaining, less actual recovery.

beats.full_text: Anxiety often persists because the body often receives safety before the mind can believe it. More pressure can register as more threat, even when the intention is improvement.
beats.ssot_text: Anxiety often persists because the body often receives safety before the mind can believe it. More pressure can register as more threat, even when the intention is improvement.

beats.speakable_text: Anxiety often persists because the body often receives safety before the mind can believe it. More pressure can register as more threat, even when the intention is improvement.

beats.full_text: Try this. Press both feet into the floor, widen your gaze. And name five ordinary objects out loud. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.
beats.ssot_text: Try this: press both feet into the floor, widen your gaze, and name five ordinary objects out loud. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.

beats.full_text: Bookmark the pattern. Signal, reset, next action. Physical orientation gives the mind a safer place to stand.
